overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Shadow of the Tomb Raider) showing a character exploring an ancient Mesoamerican-inspired stone village. The character walks through cobblestone streets past market stalls, temples with intricate carvings, and NPC villagers under bright tropical sunlight.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the stone gate entrance toward the carved archway

clay pots and wooden barrels stacked near the gate walls
tall carved stone pillar supporting the gate structure

large stone face carving above the archway entrance

segments.scene_description: The character enters an ancient Mesoamerican village through a monumental stone gate. Clay pottery and barrels line the cobblestone path while a villager sits near the entrance. The camera moves steadily forward toward the carved archway with a large stone face above it.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market street with fabric awnings

agents.ego_description: turning left into the market street and walking past vendor stalls

wooden stall displaying animal skulls and antler decorations
tall decorative stone tower with carvings visible down the street

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a narrow market street shaded by fabric awnings. A vendor tends a stall displaying animal skulls on the right. The cobblestone path continues between stone buildings with carved pillars visible in the distance.

events.description: moving from open market into darker stairway area with torch lighting

agents.ego_description: walking up stone stairs through the market area toward the upper temple level

notable_agents.action: villager walking up the stairs ahead of the character

massive stone wall with detailed carved face and geometric patterns
stone brazier with burning flames providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character ascends stone stairs through a semi-covered market area. A massive carved stone face dominates the wall to the right while torch braziers provide warm lighting. The environment transitions from open sky to a more enclosed stone corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper temple terrace with carved monoliths

events.description: character turns right to navigate around the temple terrace

agents.ego_description: navigating the upper temple terrace, turning to explore the carved structures

notable_agents.action: guard standing on elevated platform overlooking the terrace

entered.detail: tall cylindrical stone pillar with intricate relief carvings
rectangular stone basin filled with greenish water
dense tropical jungle and mountains visible beyond the stone structures

segments.scene_description: The character explores an upper temple terrace featuring carved stone pillars and a water basin. A guard stands watch on an elevated platform. The camera turns to reveal jungle mountains in the background beyond the stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: central plaza with pyramid temples and market stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through the central plaza toward the large temple entrance

notable_agents.action: villager walking alongside the character through the plaza

entered.detail: stepped pyramid temple rising above the surrounding structures
massive stone building with open entrance and columns
wooden market table displaying clay jars and pottery

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide central plaza with a stepped pyramid temple visible in the background. Market stalls with pottery line the cobblestone square while villagers walk through the open space. The camera approaches a large temple entrance with massive columns.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the entrance of an ancient Mesoamerican village into its expansive central plaza. It begins by passing through a monumental stone gate lined with clay pottery and barrels, moving steadily forward under a large carved stone face. As the character turns left, the scene shifts into a narrow market street shaded by fabric awnings and stalls of animal skulls before ascending stone stairs into a semi-covered corridor lit by warm torch braziers. The camera then emerges onto an upper temple terrace featuring carved pillars and a water basin, momentarily revealing distant jungle mountains beyond the architecture. Finally, the view opens wide into a central plaza where villagers walk among pottery stalls toward a massive stepped pyramid temple and its towering columns.
